body: "Details of the application  Severn Trent Water Limited have applied to the Environment Agency for two licences.  The Environment Agency is giving notice of these applications in accordance with Section 37 of the Water Resources Act 1991 and Regulation 6 of the Water Resources (Abstraction and Impounding) Regulations 2006.  The application seeks to vary licence serial numbers 03/28/71/0001 and 03/28/71/0041 which authorise abstraction of water from groundwater at National Grid References SK 60 67, SK 60 68, and SK 60 70.  The proposed variations are as follows:  For 03/28/71/0001 – The addition of two aggregate conditions; a maximum annual abstraction of 4,998,000 cubic metres from licences 03/28/71/0001 and  03/28/71/0041, and a rolling 15-year aggregate on 03/28/71/0001.  For 03/28/71/0041 – an increase in annual abstraction to 3,022,200 cubic metres and a rolling 15-year aggregate on 03/28/71/0041.  Both applications are linked to the Water Industry National Environment Programme scheme.  How to view the application  Please contact us via e-mail or use the number below to arrange to see the application documents.  How to comment on the application  Send any representation about this application in writing, quoting the name of the applicant and reference number NPS/WR/043376 and NPS/WR/043377 to the Environment Agency at the Permitting and Support Centre, Water Resources Team, Quadrant 2, 99 Parkway Avenue, Sheffield S9 4WF or by email to: PSC-WaterResources@environment-agency.gov.uk  By 5 February 2025.  For advice about how to make a representation call 03708 506 506. "
